summary: The diff shows only modifications to project_state.json, which appears to be a metadata/tracking file. No actual implementation changes to the AboutFounder component, image assets, or frontend code are present in the diff. Both requirements (REQ-14 and REQ-15) regarding image replacement and asset storage are missing from the implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the founder profile image in the About Founder section with the uploaded founder photo
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to the AboutFounder component or any frontend component files are present in the diff. The image element update is not implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the new founder photo is stored as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated and referenced correctly in the AboutFounder component
missing_requirements.reason: No new image asset file (founder-nitesh.dim_400x400.png) was added to frontend/public/assets/generated directory. No component file modifications show updated asset path references.
